name: @kicad-routing-tools/tscircuit-autorouter
description: WASM build of KiCadRoutingTools' Rust grid router for tscircuit custom autorouting.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build rust_router --target nodejs --out-dir ../pkg-node --no-default-features --features wasm && bun scripts/embed-wasm-loader.mjs && bun --eval "await Bun.write('pkg-node/.npmignore', '')"
scripts.build: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:ts
